home_feature_subtitle: We are developping software solutions in Germany
home_feature1_description: Quadruped Robot for patroling and alarming
home_feature2_description: Automated inspection and cutter robot for coal mining
home_feature3_description: Bipedal robots designed to assist with household chores
home_videoText_title: We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them — Albert Einstein
home_videoText_description: That's why we are developping software solutions to make human life easier by thinking with different perspective
home_content2_fragment_description: We provide a solution to industrial problems with futuristic innovations.
home_content2_item1_description: We reshape traditional industries by bring modern technologies.
home_content2_item2_description: From robotics to webapp: we drive innovations that change industries.
home_content2_item3_description: To change future plan today, Contact Us.
home_content3_fragment_h3tag: MBT received the BSFZ seal of approval
home_content3_fragment_description_first: We are delighted to have been awarded the BSFZ seal as a company. This recognition confirms our ongoing efforts and investments in research and development. The BSFZ seal certifies the research and development activities of companies that have received at least one positive decision from the
home_content3_fragment_description_secon: It is a valuable confirmation of our innovative strength and our commitment to constantly developing new solutions.
aboutus_metadata_description: Learn more about our vision, values, and the team behind MBT Systems.
aboutus_Content2_1_description: Our focus here is on the development of a mobile system that can move intelligently and adaptably in space and fulfill various tasks. This research builds on our extensive experience and partnerships in mechanical engineering and software, which we have gained from our core mining business. This enables us to also participate in the robotics industry. Our mission is to revolutionise the future of autonomous mining through technological innovation and to help shape robotics. We invite you to be part of this exciting journey.
aboutus_values_subtitle: Principles that guide our collaborative daily work
aboutus_values_1_description: We solve problems for traditional business with advanced technologies
aboutus_values_2_description: We deliver our customers the best solution possible with full security as soon as possible
aboutus_values_3_description: Compromising with quality is not in our dictionary
aboutus_values_4_description: We disclose all customer side hardwares and software documentation and reliability
aboutus_values_5_description: We believe in team and our team is can bond through work with all external teams
aboutus_values_6_description: Flexible mindset makes our solutions scalable
aboutus_Content2_2_description: Our roots are in mining and we specialise in the development of sophisticated control units, providing complete system solutions for fully autonomous underground mining systems used for coal mining. As the market leader in this sector, we set standards. Our headquarters in Germany is home to an engineering office specialising in the development and research of mechanical engineering software. we have expanded our field of activity and founded a new division in the field of robotics.
service_metadata_description: Discover our Robotics Solution development, Software optimization, Mining Technology development and Technology Consulting services.
service_Content_1_description: Comprehensive solutions designed to maximize the potential of your industrial presence.
service_ServiceList_1_description: Quadruped and Humanoid robot to solve Industrial and personal repititive work problems
service_ServiceList_2_description: Mining automation and machinery development for functional work process, safety and security
service_ServiceList_3_description: IT and Software solutions for automation, autonomous nagivation and mapping
service_Content_2_description: We specialize in building fast, secure, and scalable Robotic System using the latest technologies. We transform your vision into an impactful system for better experience.
service_Content2_1_items_1_description: Your industry will have secured and responsive alarm system.
service_Content2_1_items_2_description: Fast and improved performance of your company with modern technology as helping hand.
service_Content2_1_Fragment_description: We specialize in building fast, secure and scalable security system using the latest quadruped robot technologies. We transform your visionary need into an impactful running digital system.
service_Content2_2_items_1_description: Your industry or house will have responsive helping hand system.
service_Content2_2_items_2_description: Fast and improved performance of your human tasks like folding clothes, dish washing or cooking
service_Content2_2_Fragment_description: We specialize in building fast, secure and scalable product handling and human task handling system using the latest humanoid robot technologies for both home and industries
service_Content_3_description: We specialize in building safe, secure, and automated Mining System using the latest technologies. We transform your need into an impactful system for faster process of mining goods
service_Content2_3_items_1_description: Your mines will have industry standard safe controlling system.
service_Content2_3_items_2_description: Automatic cutting, transporting, safety inspection and alarming system will make your mining process faster and secured
service_Content2_3_Fragment_description: We specialize in developping and commissiong fast, secure and scalable mining system and automation using the latest and advanced industry standard technologies.
service_Content2_4_items_1_description: Your industrial eco system will be upgraded without hampering your pipeline.
service_Content2_4_items_2_description: Your mining technology will be improved in performance with minimal changes of your current equipments
service_Content2_4_Fragment_description: We specialize in developping and commissiong scalable mining software and hardware for automation system upgradation for your existing coherent technological eco-system.
career_feature_subtitle: We are looking for creative minds and motivated talents who want to shape the future with us. Are you ready to become part of our team?
career_hovering_1_description: What counts with us is team spirit. In our team with flat hierarchies, we support each other and help you to realise your full potential.
career_hovering_2_description: Work on exciting and innovative projects that really make a difference. With us, you have the opportunity to contribute your ideas, work on solutions and research new technologies.
career_hovering_3_description: We also offer an inspiring environment that encourages creativity and productivity. Our office is modern and has everything you need to feel comfortable and work effectively.
career_hovering_4_description: We value and promote diversity in all facets. Different perspectives and experiences enrich our work and contribute significantly to our success. Everyone is welcome here, regardless of origin, gender, age or lifestyle. We firmly believe in a diverse team for creativity and innovation
career_hero_title: Apply & become part of our team!
career_hero_title_span: We look forward to know you.
career_hero_description: Send us your application to bewerbung@mbt-systems.de and tell us why you are the perfect fit for us.
career_application_ways_item_1_descripti: You can find our current vacancies on Indeed.
career_application_ways_item_2_descripti: No vacancies that suit you? No problem! Send us your application to bewerbung@mbt-systems.de Your skills and passion could be exactly what we need!
career_content_description: Many more opotunites are hidden for future
career_content2_1_description: Are you in the middle of your studies or just starting your apprenticeship and want to gain practical experience? We offer you the perfect opportunity to combine theory and practice, from internships to final theses. Here you can work on exciting projects, learn from experienced colleagues and develop your skills. We support you in setting your professional course. Take the first step and become part of a team that will support your development and give you the decisive boost for your future career!
career_content2_2_description: You've finished university and are ready to conquer the world? We also offer you the perfect launch pad for your future career. Here you can contribute your fresh ideas, learn from experienced specialists and work in an environment that promotes innovation and creativity. We believe in the potential of each individual and give you the tools to achieve great things. Take the first step and become part of a team that is shaping the future - yours and ours!
career_content2_3_description: You have already gained valuable experience and are ready for the next step in your career? We also offer you the opportunity to use and develop your expertise in exciting projects. Here you can develop your skills and innovative solutions and work in a team that values and promotes your experience. We believe in continuous growth and offer you the platform to take your career to the next level. Become part of a company that values your passion and expertise - and together we will shape the future!
form_subject: New message from MBT website Contact-Page
contact_page_description: Get in touch with us to discuss your next project.
contact_page_features_title: We are here to help you
contact_page_features_subtitle: Choose the communication channel you prefer. We respond in less than 24 hours.
contact_page_features4_description: We understand your needs to offer tailored solutions.
contact_page_features5_description: We resolve any doubt or technical incident quickly.
contact_page_features6_description: We advise you to ensure the success of your project.
